inputs.label: Number of Cups
inputs.businessContext: The number of cups of tea to be prepared.

businessContext_i18n.en: The number of cups of tea to be prepared.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le nombre de tasses de thé à préparer.

inputs.label: Water per Cup
inputs.businessContext: Standard volume of water per cup.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard volume of water per cup.

inputs.label: Tea Leaves per Cup
inputs.businessContext: Standard weight of tea leaves per cup for medium strength.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard weight of tea leaves per cup for medium strength.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Orta sertlik için fincan başına standart çay yaprağı ağırlığı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Standardgewicht der Teeblätter pro Tasse für mittlere Stärke.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids standard des feuilles de thé par tasse pour une infusion moyenne.

inputs.label: Strength Factor
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier for tea amount: 1 for normal, 1.5 for strong, 0.5 for light.

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplier for tea amount: 1 for normal, 1.5 for strong, 0.5 for light.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çay miktarı çarpanı: normal için 1, sert için 1.5, hafif için 0.5.
businessContext_i18n.de: Multiplikator für die Teemenge: 1 für normal, 1,5 für stark, 0,5 für leicht.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Multiplicateur pour la quantité de thé : 1 pour normal, 1,5 pour fort, 0,5 pour léger.

inputs.label: Water Absorption Rate
inputs.businessContext: Amount of water (ml) absorbed by 1 gram of tea leaves.

businessContext_i18n.en: Amount of water (ml) absorbed by 1 gram of tea leaves.
businessContext_i18n.tr: 1 gram çay yaprağı tarafından emilen su miktarı (ml).
businessContext_i18n.de: Wassermenge (ml), die von 1 g Teeblättern absorbiert wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Quantité d'eau (ml) absorbée par 1 gramme de feuilles de thé.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
